title: Tranexamic Acid to Prevent OpeRation in Chronic Subdural Hematoma

skipped_criteria: CT-confirmed chronic subdural hematoma (cSDH): requires imaging/diagnostic result not available in schema.
mNIHSS score <=4 and stable neurological deficit: neurological scoring fields not in schema.
Primary surgical treatment triggers (medically intractable headache, midline shift >10mm, imminent death within 24 hours): clinical/imaging parameters not in schema.
Structural causes for subdural haemorrhage (arachnoid cysts, cortical vascular malformations, cranial surgery <1 year): prior medical history and imaging findings not in schema.
Aneurysmal subarachnoid haemorrhage: specific diagnosis/history field not in schema.

Active treatment for deep vein thrombosis, pulmonary embolism or cerebral thrombosis: anticoagulant_use captures anticoagulants but not the specific indication or distinction from secondary prophylaxis.
Active intravascular clotting or disseminated intravascular coagulation: lab/clinical diagnosis not in schema.
Known hypersensitivity or allergy to TXA or its ingredients: allergy history not in schema.
History of blood coagulation disorder (hypercoagulability disorder): prior medical history not in schema.
History of severe renal impairment (eGFR <30 ml/min or serum creatinine >150 μmol/L): lab values not in schema.
History of anaemia (haemoglobin <6 mmol/L): lab values not in schema.
History of convulsions: prior medical history not in schema.
History of inability to safely swallow oral medication: functional history not in schema.
Inability to obtain informed consent including language barrier: consent/administrative criterion not in schema.
